name: Fudge Nougouts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat together sugar, butter and milk.
2. Boil for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in chocolate chips, flour, crumbs, walnuts and vanilla extract.
4. Blend thoroughly.
5. Spread mixture into a buttered 12 x 8 inch or 9 x 9 inch pan.
6. Cool completely.
7. Cut into squares.
8. Wrap each square individually in plastic wrap.
